inputs.label: Total Distinct Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct items to be arranged.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of distinct items to be arranged.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de elementos distintos a ordenar.

inputs.label: Items to Arrange
inputs.businessContext: Number of items to select for arrangement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items to select for arrangement.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der für die Anordnung auszuwählenden Elemente.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'éléments à sélectionner pour l'organisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de elementos a seleccionar para la ordenación.

inputs.label: Cost per Permutation
inputs.businessContext: Cost incurred for each possible permutation (e.g., changeover cost).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost incurred for each possible permutation (e.g., changeover cost).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her olası permütasyon için katlanılan maliyet (örneğin, değişim maliyeti).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten, die für jede mögliche Permutation anfallen (z. B. Rüstkosten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût encouru pour chaque permutation possible (par exemple, coût de changement).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste incurrido por cada permutación posible (ej. coste de cambio).

inputs.label: Setup Cost
inputs.businessContext: Fixed setup cost independent of permutations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed setup cost independent of permutations.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de configuration fixe indépendant des permutations.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste fijo de preparación independiente de las permutaciones.
